配角描写还要在深入"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1750964316,"group_id":"7518794748098776126","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/NwzlyMIWF+10hsjMA/z/lI0SNIb6vZ0b3/I24BiFn4","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3802547561700109","user_name":"用户38025475"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3802547561700109","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7518794748098776126","book_info":{"abstract":"故事讲述的是人类因为核武辐射导致大灭绝，而这时地球因为环境变化下了一场上万年都不会停的雨，导致海平面上身，整个世界都被淹没。在辐射的感染下，地球生物变异，成为恐怖的怪物，还有人与人之间的争斗，主角一行人就是在这种情况下招兵买马，杀伐果断，绝境下求生存而展开的故事，算不上爽文，但是觉得让人兴奋。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o2bb08318d43209dda598c61686e0aec9~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"在逃打字机","author_id":"","book_id":"7518794748098776126","book_name":"末世海平线","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281808","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":8,\"name\":\"科幻末世\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8\u0026name=科幻末世\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":68,\"name\":\"末世\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68\u0026name=末世\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":379,\"name\":\"求生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379\u0026name=求生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":494,\"name\":\"囤物资\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494\u0026name=囤物资\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u00
